panel.html:
How This Works
Generate a table of results like the example below.
Then call the macro `convertGraphCose(a,b,c,d)`to generate a Cytoscape Graph visualization of the results as per this example, where;
a = number of hops you want to filter on (max 9)
b =graph spread factor (start with 500 and increase for larger graphs)
c = clustering of connected nodes (start with 150 and increase for larger graphs)
d = centering pull factor (start with 1 and increase for larger graphs)
to generate a Cytoscape Graph visualization of the results as per this example generate a Cytoscape Graph visualization of the results as per this example
Select the visualization "Graph Data Viz"
Documentation available at
https://www.octamis.com/graph-data-viz-docs/index.html
Functionality
Zoom - mouse wheel
Pan - left click in space hold and drag
Move node - left click and hold on node and drag
Node menu - right click on a node
Edge menu - right click on an edge
Graph menu - right click a blank area of the viz

search.query: | inputlookup sample2.csv | table type id label source target width nodeRepulsion edgeElasticity gravity node* edge* font* advanced textWrap displayDetails url Att*

panel.title: !!! DO NOT REMOVE THIS HTML STYLE HIDDEN PANEL !!!
